title: add progress bars during copy
body:
@mtrmac PTAL since this is vendoring other stuff not related to progress bars.

Signed-off-by: Antonio Murdaca runcom@redhat.com

comments.body: If we have progress bars, should we cut a new version for Rawhide/F25, so people can play with it.

> If we have progress bars, should we cut a new version for Rawhide/F25, so people can play with it.

@rhatdan yep, I'm going to re-vendor containers/image into skopeo and cut a new 0.1.15 tag in skopeo, @mtrmac ok?
Sure, there have been enough bugfixes. (But still without docker-daemon I assume?)

> (But still without docker-daemon I assume?)

yeah, I'll tag from master
